interaction_phrase: photonics courses commonly available at U.S. universities
occurrence_sentence: Participants receive a unique, hands-on experience bridging gaps between photonics courses commonly available at U.S. universities and the skills required to specifically support the design, manufacture, testing, and packaging of foundry-based integrated photonics.

interaction_phrase: Business Development and Facilities manager for AIM Photonics' Test, Assembly and Packaging
occurrence_sentence: Chris Striemer is the Business Development and Facilities manager for AIM Photonics' Test, Assembly and Packaging facility in Rochester, NY, where he coordinates projects with members and customers to most efficiently leverage the institute's advanced packaging, metrology, and testing capabilities for their prototype designs in order to help drive them toward commercial success.
